title: Lumen Session — 2026-03-11 (PoC Complete, Go Verdict)
content:
# Lumen Session — 2026-03-11

## Summary

PoC complete. Go verdict reached. The Lumen audio pipeline is validated for production development.

## Work Completed

### Phase 2.2 — Per-Stream Transcription (Validated)
- Wired WebRTC per-player audio streams through Silero VAD → shared Whisper instance → speaker-labeled transcript
- Hub captures PCM via Web Audio API, sends over WebSocket to Python transcription server
- Live transcript display in Electron Hub with deduplication
- Upgraded from `medium` to `large-v3` — significantly better accuracy, confirmed to fit on RTX 3070 alongside Foundry (~5,857 MB / 8,192 MB)
- Eliminated Whisper hallucinations ("ghosts") by tuning VAD: threshold 0.5→0.65, min speech 250→300ms, added RMS energy gate (discard segments with RMS < 0.01)

### Phase 3 — 60-Minute Stability Test (Passed)
- Built `poc/phase3/stability_test.py`: feeds Knights of Everflame audio through 3 simulated player streams (Tariel, Linn, Ikyulys)
- Fixed asyncio hang: added `stop_event` checks around transcribe lock and periodic `asyncio.sleep(0)` yields in chunk processing loop
- Results:
  - **16,548 segments** transcribed, **0 errors**
  - **Latency:** avg 1,681ms / p95 3,996ms / max 8,779ms
  - **Latency drift:** +1.5% first-to-last quarter (stable)
  - **VRAM:** avg 6,349 MB, spread 371 MB (6,022–6,393), no leak
  - Foundry VTT running simultaneously throughout

### Phase 4 — Go Verdict
- All Go/No-Go criteria met
- `large-v3` confirmed as recommended default for all tiers including 8 GB cards

## Key Decisions
- **ADR-006 revised:** `large-v3` upgraded from "optimal for 12+ GB" to "recommended for all tiers" based on Phase 2 real-world testing
- **ADR-008 added:** 60-minute stability test results documenting pipeline validation

## Files Updated
- `projects/Lumen/benchmarks/phase3_stability.md` — stability report with Go/No-Go table
- `projects/Lumen/benchmarks/phase3_transcript.jsonl` — 16,548-segment raw transcript
- `projects/Lumen/benchmarks/phase3_transcript.txt` — readable transcript
- `projects/Lumen/plan.md` — Phases 2, 3, 4 marked complete; Go verdict
- `brain/Lumen/lumen-architecture.md` — ADR-008 added, pending decisions updated
- `brain/Lumen/lumen.md` — status updated to "PoC Complete", open questions resolved

## Next
- Proceed to v0.1 product development when ready
- Post-PoC roadmap: pipeline + Foundry connector + transcript viewer


---
**2026-03-16T00:37:27.717093-07:00 | Created via Engram**
